sharc
Documentation développeur
Program.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections.Generic;
3 using System.Linq;
4 using System.Text;
5 using System.IO;
6 using System.Xml;
7 
8 namespace XmlToCMake
9 {
10  class Program
11  {
12  private static int RTCODE_OK = 0;
13  private static int RTCODE_ERROR = 1;
14 
15  private static string codename = "XmlToCMake.exe";
16 
17  static void Main (string[] args)
18  {
19  bool show_help = false;
20 
21  var parser = new XmlToCMakeLibraryParser ();
22 
23  var options = new Mono.Options.OptionSet () {
24  { "v|verbose", "Verbose mode", v => parser.Verbose = true },
25  { "h|help", "Show help page", v => show_help = true },
26  { "axldb:", "axldb file including all .axl file paths", v => parser.AxlDbFile = v },
27  { "eclipse-config:", "Generate Eclipse configuration for includes and macro definitions", v => parser.EclipseConfigFile = v }
28  };
29 
30  try {
31 
32  var extras = options.Parse (args);
33 
34  // Check if remaining args looks like options
35  foreach (var arg in extras) {
36  if (arg.StartsWith ("-")) {
37  Console.Error.WriteLine ("Invalid option {0}", arg);
38 
39  showHelpAndExit (options);
40 
41  Environment.Exit (RTCODE_ERROR);
42  }
43  }
44 
45  if (show_help || args.Length < 6) {
46 
47  showHelpAndExit (options);
48 
49  Environment.Exit (RTCODE_OK);
50  }
51 
52  parser.Parse (extras);
53 
54  Environment.Exit (RTCODE_OK);
55 
56  } catch (Mono.Options.OptionException e) {
57 
58  Console.Error.WriteLine (e.Message);
59 
60  showHelpAndExit (options);
61 
62  Environment.Exit (RTCODE_ERROR);
63 
64  } catch (Exception e) {
65 
66  Console.Error.WriteLine ("XmlToCMake exiting with an unexpected exception :");
67  Console.Error.WriteLine (" Message : {0}", e.Message);
68  Console.Error.WriteLine (" Message : {0}", e.InnerException.Message);
69  Console.Error.WriteLine (" Type : {0}", e.GetType().FullName);
70 
71  Environment.Exit (RTCODE_ERROR);
72 
73  }
74  }
75 
76  static private void showHelpAndExit (Mono.Options.OptionSet options)
77  {
78  Console.WriteLine ("Requested Help page");
79 
80  Console.WriteLine ("Usage: {1} [options] LIBRARIES_FILE PACKAGES_FILE ARCANE_PACKAGES_FILE OUTPUT_FILE CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR {0}",
81  "CMAKE_BINARY_DIR PATHS_TO_INCLUDE [PATHS_TO_INCLUDE_IN_OLD_FORMAT...]", codename);
82  Console.WriteLine ("Options : ");
83  options.WriteOptionDescriptions (Console.Out);
84  }
85  }
86 }
